headline: Agilent Launches Multi-Attribute Method (MAM) Solution for BioPharma Quality Control
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 26, 2026--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today announced the release of a new multi-attribute method (MAM) workflow designed to help pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical quality control (QC) laboratories implement liquid chromatography high-resolution mass spectrometry (LC/HRMS) in routine, regulated testing environments.

headline: Agilent Launches New GC Systems with GC Assist to Improve Laboratory Efficiency and Data Quality
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 26, 2026--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today announced the launch of the new 8890B GC and 8860B GC with GC Assist. GC Assist is the new, advanced instrument intelligence that provides system monitoring, built-in troubleshooting, and remote connectivity to analytical instrumentation within the laboratory’s secure network. These systems enable higher performance and productivity across gas chromatography analyses.
